text.title: Experimentation at Scale Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the spec artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: experiment_id not kebab; hypothesis too short; primary_metric.delta_direction missing; guardrails <3; mde sample_size=0; decision 'hold' not allowed.

list.item: decision = 'hold' or absent — every readout must be ship/kill/iterate.
srm_passed = false yet decision != 'kill' (must debug bucketing first).
experiment_id duplicating an active or archived experiment with the same hypothesis (deduplication failed).
